trigger: Agent #5 reported hexa_v2 transpiler cannot codegen InvariantDecl/GuardStmt — 20+ [codegen_c2] ERROR after ef7ccc1 merge

investigation.transpiler_kind: self-hosted — codegen_c2.hexa compiled to hexa_cc.c then clang
investigation.error_dispatcher_gap: gen2_stmt has no branches for GuardStmt/GuardLetStmt/InvariantDecl despite top-level codegen_c2 and codegen_c2_full handling InvariantDecl (lines 123, 2785). Nested usage falls through to else → main_parts.push(gen2_stmt(...)) → unhandled

handlers_added.pattern: return ""  // no-op — static analysis in self/invariant_check.hexa
handlers_added.rationale: defensive — top-level already handled but nested occurrences possible inside impl bodies

transpile_dry_run.rebuild_status_NOT_run: hexa_v2 binary NOT regenerated — stage0 rebuild is explicitly forbidden by task brief
transpile_dry_run.expected_after_rebuild: GuardStmt line errors drop to 0. FnDecl/StructDecl errors likely REMAIN because their root cause is UPSTREAM parse error cascade, not codegen gap

upstream_blocker_discovered.summary: hexa_v2 LEXER/PARSER itself is stale (pre-pub, pre-scientific-notation)

parse_errors_in_hexa_full_hexa.cause: 1e-10 float literal — lexer parses '1' int then 'e-10' ident
pub visibility keyword not in hexa_v2 parser grammar
expected RBrace, got Eof — cascade from unrecovered pub errors

upstream_blocker_discovered.implication: Even after my codegen_c2.hexa fix propagates into a rebuilt hexa_v2, the FnDecl/StructDecl error cascade will persist because parser recovery mis-attaches declarations after Pub errors. 44+ of the 221 errors cannot be fixed by codegen changes alone.

remaining_unhandled_kinds_prediction.mechanism: hexa_v2 parser cannot consume 'pub' keyword → parser enters error-recovery → subsequent FnDecl/StructDecl get nested incorrectly → reach gen2_stmt instead of top-level dispatcher

rebuild_viability.reason: My codegen edit is correct and necessary, but insufficient. Rebuild will still fail because: (1) hexa_v2 cannot parse hexa_full.hexa without scientific-notation and pub keyword support in its LEXER/PARSER, (2) clang compilation of hexa_cc.c.new already shows >20 C errors (undeclared parse_drop_stmt per Agent #5).
green_light_requires: hexa_v2 PARSER: 'pub' keyword tolerated (simplest: pub-as-noop prefix on let/fn/struct)
hexa_cc.c.new clang compile errors (parse_drop_stmt etc.) resolved
rebuild_viability.alternative_path: Strip pub + expand 1e-X to 0.00000...1 in hexa_full.hexa copy, rebuild hexa_v2 from that minimized source, then re-port to full source. High-effort workaround.

for_hexa_lang_maintainer: 1. Add scientific-notation support to hexa_v2 lexer (self/native/lexer_v2.c around float token recognizer).
2. Add 'pub' as accepted prefix token in hexa_v2 parser (self/native/parser_v2.c — treat as visibility-noop).
3. Rebuild hexa_v2: regenerate self/native/hexa_cc.c (via ./hexa run scripts/flatten_imports.hexa or similar), fix clang errors (parse_drop_stmt etc.), then compile.
4. Run scripts/build_stage0.sh to verify full pipeline: transpile → clang → smoke test OK.
5. Verify map-new-key fix (ef7ccc1) is live by running shared/harness/test/stage1_map_new_key_repro.hexa against new build/hexa_stage0.
for_nexus_users: Continue using shared/blowup/lib/map_stage1_compat.hexa.inc bypass helper for new modules until stage0 binary ships.
No regression risk from my edit — it only affects future rebuilds.

memory_update_suggestion: Append to reference-hexa-binary-status.md: 'hexa_v2 lexer/parser stale (no pub, no scientific notation) — stage0 rebuild requires lexer_v2.c + parser_v2.c upgrade first. codegen_c2.hexa GuardStmt/GuardLetStmt/InvariantDecl handlers added 2026-04-14 per agent_followup but inert until hexa_v2 rebuilt.'
